author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Committed 1b722b6a on feature/751-hubsource-read-abstraction. Implementation agent died mid-task; recovered by completing: mod hub_source registration in main.rs bin tree, test-helper git invocation fixes (--git-dir pointed at repo root instead of .git; pinned-commit test never actually moved the ref so its assertion was vacuous -- now reuses git_commit_hub_layout and asserts the SHA moved), production fix in ObjectStoreSource::agent_ids treating 'Not a valid object name <sha>:agents' (matched with full tree path) as empty hub, dead_code annotations for the bin module tree per codebase precedent, and pedantic clippy cleanups. reduce() extraction verified semantically equivalent including the empty-events+no-watermark edge case. Gates: cargo fmt clean, clippy --all-targets -D warnings clean, 1914 lib tests passing (1906 baseline + 8 new parity/pinning tests). Awaiting push by user, then PR to develop.
